blended.narrative: Aspen Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 6,993 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.0" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 33".
